messages.text: first time clearing a jam on line 3, what's the lockout order exactly?

SOP-1190: 1) labeler STOP, 2) line E-STOP, 3) open and lock the electrical disconnect, 4) close and lock the air supply valve, 5) bleed residual air to 0 psi at the regulator gauge, 6) verify zero energy before reaching in
why bleed the air if I already locked the valve?
stored pneumatic energy can still actuate the applicator even with the valve locked. zero on the gauge is how you prove it's safe. never skip the bleed
got it, lock then bleed to zero, verify gauge
